atRisk.message: Ajiya ɗaya kafin {{date}} na kiyaye jerin ka. Babu gaggawa, kowace ajiya ta buri ko da'ira tana ƙidaya.

hero.captionEmpty: Yi ajiya a wannan {{period}} don kunna harshen wutar ka

share.title: Raba jerin ka
share.description: Katin ka yana nuna adadin jerin ka kaɗai. Adadin kuɗi na ci gaba da zama na sirri sai idan ka kunna su.
share.includeAmount: Haɗa da adadin da aka yi tanadi

card.oneDepositPer: Ajiya ɗaya a kowace {{period}} na kiyaye harshen wutar ka.
card.changeOncePerYear: Ana iya canza yawan sau sau ɗaya a shekara.
card.changeOncePerYearNext: Ana iya canza yawan sau sau ɗaya a shekara. Canji na gaba zai buɗe a {{year}}.

badges.title: Tarin bajoji
badges.progressNone: Kiyaye jerin ka na tsawon watanni uku don samun baji na gaba.
badges.progressToday: Baji na gaba na zuwa yau, ci gaba.
badges.empty: Kiyaye jeri na tsawon watanni uku don samun baji na farko. Akwai huɗu da za a tara kowace shekara, ɗaya ga kowace kakar.

freezes.title: Daskarar jeri
freezes.description: Daskarewa yana kare jerin ka ta atomatik idan ka rasa lokaci ɗaya. Kana samun ɗaya kowane watanni uku (har huɗu a shekara), kuma ana iya amfani da ɗaya kaɗai a kowace kwata.

reminders.title: Tunatarwa mai laushi
reminders.description: Tunatarwa ɗaya kafin {{period}} ya ƙare, sai idan kana so. An kashe ta ta asali.

vacation.title: Yanayin hutu
vacation.description: Rayuwa tana faruwa. Dakatar da jerin ka sau ɗaya a shekara (har kwanaki 30) ba tare da rasa ci gaban ka ba.
vacation.usedThisYear: An yi amfani da hutu wannan shekara

footer.disclaimer: Jerin ka ba ya taɓa shafar ma'aunin ka ko kuɗin ka.

milestone.title: An samu sabon baji
milestone.description: Watanni uku na tanadi mai dorewa. Wannan daidaito shi ne komai. Madalla.

profile.title: Yawan sau na jeri
profile.description: Zaɓi sau nawa ake buƙatar ajiya don kiyaye jerin tanadin ka.
profile.frequencyError: An kasa canza yawan sau na jerin ka.
profile.lockNote: Kana iya canza yawan sau na jerin ka sau ɗaya a shekarar kalanda.
profile.lockNoteNext: Kana iya canza yawan sau na jerin ka sau ɗaya a shekarar kalanda. Canjin ka na gaba zai buɗe a {{year}}.

daily.label: Kullum
daily.description: Kiyaye harshen wuta da ajiya kowace rana. Mafi kyau ga al'adar tanadi ta yau da kullum.

weekly.label: Mako-mako
weekly.description: Ajiya ɗaya a kowane lokaci a cikin mako na kiyaye jerin ka. Sannu-sannu, mai dorewa.

monthly.label: Wata-wata
monthly.description: Ajiya ɗaya kowane watan kalanda shi ne duk abin da ake buƙata. Mai laushi kuma ba matsi.
